category_sources: source_facts.description says ic-wasm performs Wasm transformations for ICP canisters; official README describes transforming Wasm canisters running on the Internet Computer.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README at https://github.com/dfinity/ic-wasm uses the heading ic-wasm.
docs_sources: Official repository README contains installation and usage documentation for ic-wasm.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dfinity/ic-wasm, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Wasm transformations for Internet Computer canisters.
